title: EQ - Select a value, kill the app, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) does not persist after app kill and relaunch in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 1–7 for each of the remaining EQ values: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The EQ value selected before killing the app persists after reopening the app for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ).
